channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: This new AI chatbot is your personal present-finding wizard
item.description: Finding the perfect present isn’t always easy—especially if the people in your life are, let’s say, challenging to shop for. And while gift guides can be a great resource for certain purposes, they aren’t exactly catered to your personal needs and the tastes of those around you.
item.dc:creator: Chris Hoffman, Fast Company

item.title: NASA's Parker Solar Probe aims to fly closer to the sun like never before
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A NASA spacecraft aims to fly closer to the sun than any object sent before. The Parker Solar Probe was launched in 2018 to get a close-up look at the sun. Since then, it has flown straight through the sun's corona: the outer atmosphere visible during a total solar eclipse.
item.dc:creator: ADITHI RAMAKRISHNAN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: House Republicans Brush Off Elon Musk's Threats
item.description: House Republicans are largely ignoring Elon Musk's threats to unseat members who supported the initial government funding measure he helped torpedo earlier this week.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Dynamic Pricing in Ecommerce: Good for Business, Bad for Consumers?
item.description: Study reveals Amazon leads the way in dynamic pricing with 12.6 price changes per day, followed closely by Walmart and Wayfair.
item.dc:creator: udinmwenefosa@gmail.com (Efosa Udinmwen), TechRadar

item.title: Ambitious Labor Strikes Sweep Major US Companies
item.description: Amazon and Starbucks workers stage strikes across several cities, seeking union recognition and better working conditions.
item.dc:creator: Haleluya Hadero, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Former OpenAI Engineer, Whistleblower Found Dead at 26
item.description: Suchir Balaji, a former OpenAI engineer and whistleblower who raised concerns about copyright infringement, has died in San Francisco.
item.dc:creator: Matt O'Brien, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Albania to close TikTok for a year blaming it for promoting violence among children
item.description: TIRANA, Albania (AP) — Albania's prime minister said Saturday the government will shut down the video service TikTok for one year, blaming it for inciting violence and bullying, especially among children.
item.dc:creator: LLAZAR SEMINI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: GAO report says DHS, other agencies need to up their game in AI risk assessment
item.description: A new report from the US Government Accountability Office (GAO) appears to indicate that no US federal agency reporting into the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) knows the full extent or probability of harm that AI can do the nation’s critical infrastructure.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Senators urge Biden to delay TikTok ban
item.description: Sens. Ed Markey (D-Mass.) and Rand Paul (R-Ky.) urged President Biden on Thursday to grant TikTok a 90-day extension to divest from its China-based parent company or face a ban. The pair emphasized the current deadline is set for Jan.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: WordPress.org statement threatens possible shutdown for all of 2025
item.description: Automattic CEO Matt Mullenweg on Friday announced a shutdown of almost all services on WordPress.org, the open source project site that’s the home of the software, plugins, and the WordPress community, but was unclear on when the shutdown would end.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: FIFA signs Netflix to US broadcast deal for the Women’s World Cup in 2027 and 2031
item.description: The deal announced Friday is the most significant FIFA has signed with a streaming service for a major tournament. The value was not given, though international competitions in women’s soccer have struggled to draw high-value offers.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Scholz dismisses Musk's assertion that only a far-right party can 'save' Germany
item.description: BERLIN (AP) — Chancellor Olaf Scholz on Friday dismissed an assertion by Elon Musk that only a far-right party can “save Germany,” but said that freedom of opinion "also goes for multibillionaires.” Germany is expected to vote in an early election on Feb.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Google’s contractors told to evaluate Gemini responses outside their expertise
item.description: Behind the responses from genAI models are testers who evaluate those answers for accuracy, but a report released this week casts doubt on the process.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Need a Mac VPN? Norton VPN just got a serious upgrade that you'd expect it already had
item.description: A kill switch feature finally lands on Norton's macOS app, and the provider is also expected to add it to its iPhone VPN soon. Here's all you need to know.
item.dc:creator: chiara.castro@futurenet.com (Chiara Castro), TechRadar

item.title: Asus gaming laptops leak with RTX 5090, 5080 and 5070 Ti GPUs, sparking excitement about a CES 2025 reveal
item.description: Asus ROG Strix G835 looks very powerful with an RTX 5090 on board alongside an Intel Core Ultra 9 275HX CPU.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: What is data architecture? A framework to manage data
item.description: Data architecture definition Data architecture describes the structure of an organization’s logical and physical data assets, and data management resources, according to The Open Group Architecture Framework (TOGAF).
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Amazon workers strike at multiple facilities as Teamsters seek labor contract
item.description: Workers at seven Amazon facilities went on strike Thursday, an effort by the Teamsters union to pressure the e-commerce company for a labor agreement during a key shopping period.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Trump team affirms he's leader of GOP amid 'President Musk' barbs
item.description: President-elect Trump's transition team pushed back against Democratic lawmakers who suggested Elon Musk is the "real leader" of the Republican Party after his aggressive pressure campaign against a stopgap spending measure.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: New app reveals political affiliations to US homebuyers
item.description: The platform believes social factors like age, income, and education influence buyers' decisions over home layouts.
item.dc:creator: Taylor Delandro, NewsNation

item.title: How OpenAI’s Jerry Tworek found a new way forward for large language models
item.description: The impressive intelligence gains in OpenAI’s models over time have mainly come from training them with progressively more training data, for longer amounts of time, and with massive computing power.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: Anthropic’s LLMs can’t reason, but think they can — even worse, they ignore guardrails
item.description: Anthropic on Wednesday published a study that explored how its large language model (LLM) deals with conflicting ethical requests. The results show that LLMs can still surprise, something that should scare IT execs preparing to trust generative AI (genAI) results.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Australian who falsely claimed to have invented bitcoin is found in contempt of UK court
item.description: LONDON (AP) — An Australian computer scientist who falsely claimed to be the founder of the bitcoin cryptocurrency was found Thursday to be in contempt of an order of London's High Court and was sentenced to 12 months in prison, suspended for two years.
item.dc:creator: PAN PYLAS, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Elon Musk considers funding Nigel Farage's populist party, a move that could shake up UK politics
item.description: LONDON (AP) — It’s a photo that sent a tremor through British politics: Elon Musk flanked by British politician Nigel Farage and a wealthy backer, in front of a gilt-framed painting of a young Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: JILL LAWLESS, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Apple complains Meta requests risk privacy in spat over EU efforts to widen access to iPhone tech
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Apple complained that requests from Meta Platforms for access to its operating software threaten user privacy, in a spat fueled by the European Union's intensifying efforts to get the iPhone maker to open up to products from tech rivals.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: YouTube’s top trends for 2024 include Bay Area creators
item.description: Online video giant YouTube has published its year-end top trends lists for 2024 and in includes Bay Area content creators.
item.dc:creator: Pueng Vongs, The Mercury News

item.title: The push to upskill the technology workforce in federal agencies
item.description: The federal government is facing a massive tech talent shortage, particularly as the development and use of AI continues to gain traction. The post The push to upskill the technology workforce in federal agencies first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: JavaScript is still number one – JetBrains report
item.description: JavaScript is the most-used programming language, according to JetBrains’ State of Developer Ecosystem Report 2024. But the languages with the most promising growth prospects are TypeScript, Rust, and Python, the report says.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Senate report alleges Amazon rejected warehouse safety recommendations due to productivity concerns
item.description: At least two internal Amazon studies found a link between how quickly the online retailer's warehouse workers perform tasks and workplace injuries, but the company rejected many safety recommendations out of concern the proposed changes might reduce productivity, according to a U.S.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: CompTIA introduces foundational tech certification
item.description: CompTIA has created a certification designed to provide individuals with broad foundational and digital skills that can be used to build a career in technology.
item.dc:creator: Network World
